name: 敦煌
description: Dunhuang, a oasis city at the edge of the Taklamakan Desert, was the ancient gateway to the Silk Road. Home to the spectacular Mogao Caves (UNESCO), singing sand dunes of Mingsha Mountain, and the ancient Yumenguan Pass. A mystical blend of Buddhist art, desert adventures, and star-filled night skies.
highlights: Yumenguan Pass - Ancient Silk Road fortress

climate.tips: Best visited May-Oct for comfortable weather. Summers can be hot but dry. Winters cold but caves are warmer. Avoid sandstorms in spring. Book Mogao Caves tickets early.

restaurants.name: 沙洲客根
restaurants.description: Popular restaurant serving local Dunhuang cuisine including lamb dishes and desert specialties.

restaurants.name: 敦煌夜市小吃
restaurants.description: Night market with various local snacks, grilled meats, and refreshing drinks.

restaurants.name: 驴肉黄面
restaurants.description: Legendary Dunhuang dish - donkey meat served with yellow noodles, unique local specialty.

restaurants.name: 羊肉粉汤
restaurants.description: Warming lamb and rice noodle soup, perfect breakfast before desert exploration.

restaurants.name: 杏皮水
restaurants.description: Signature Dunhuang sweet-sour drink made from dried apricots, refreshing and unique taste.

restaurants.name: 烤肉串
restaurants.description: Grilled lamb and beef skewers at night market, addictive street food.

restaurants.name: 泡儿油糕
restaurants.description: Traditional Dunhuang fried pastry with sweet filling, crispy outside and soft inside.

restaurants.name: 羊肉垫卷
restaurants.description: Tender lamb cooked with flatbread rolls, hearty Gansu dish, sharing friendly.

restaurants.name: 拉条子
restaurants.description: Hand-pulled noodles with various toppings, staple food in Gansu province.

restaurants.name: 桃符
restaurants.description: Local Dunhuang apricots and peaches, sweet and juicy from desert oasis cultivation.

restaurants.name: 沙漠枸杞
restaurants.description: High-quality goji berries from desert oases, famous Dunhuang souvenir and health product.

restaurants.name: 雪山驼掌
restaurants.description: Exotic desert specialty - camel paw cooked in various styles, unique local delicacy.

restaurants.name: 羊肉面
restaurants.description: Simple but flavorful lamb broth with hand-pulled noodles, local breakfast tradition.

restaurants.name: 李广杏
restaurants.description: Famous Dunhuang apricots named after legendary general Li Guang, sweet and aromatic.

restaurants.name: 黄面
restaurants.description: Dunhuang's famous yellow noodles with various toppings, colorful and flavorful dish.

restaurants.name: 沙葱
restaurants.description: Wild chives grown in desert areas, unique flavor and prized local vegetable.

restaurants.name: 手抓饭
restaurants.description: Rice with lamb, carrots, and raisins eaten with hands, Uighur-style pilaf.

restaurants.name: 烤全羊
restaurants.description: Whole lamb roasted in desert pit, ceremonial dish for special occasions, requires advance order.

restaurants.name: 葡萄酒
restaurants.description: Local wine from desert grapes, historical connection to Silk Road wine trade.

restaurants.name: 清真拉面
restaurants.description: Halal noodle shops in Muslim quarter serving beef and lamb noodles.

restaurants.name: 大盘鸡
restaurants.description: Large plate of chicken with potatoes and noodles, shared dish popular in Gansu/Xinjiang region.

restaurants.name: 凉皮
restaurants.description: Cold rice noodles with spicy sauce, refreshing summer street snack.

restaurants.name: 葡萄干
restaurants.description: Sweet raisins from Dunhuang's desert vineyards, popular snack and souvenir.

restaurants.name: 羊肉泡馍
restaurants.description: Crispy flatbread pieces in lamb broth, hearty Muslim dish.

restaurants.name: 冰糖雪梨
restaurants.description: Sweet pear drink with rock sugar, soothing for dry desert throat.

arrival.frequency: Daily flights from Xi'an, Lanzhou, Beijing
arrival.tips: Small airport close to city. Airport bus or taxi to city center. Book flights early as limited options.

hotels.name: 敦煌宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Best luxury in city. Book direct. Traditional Chinese style. Good base for sightseeing.

hotels.name: 敦煌山庄
hotels.bookingTips: Best location near desert. Book desert view rooms. Amazing sunrise/sunset views. Great for photography.

hotels.name: 丝路宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Good mid-range option. Themed decor. Book direct for discounts. Good location for night market.

hotels.name: 月牙泉客栈
hotels.bookingTips: Stay near desert attractions. Book early for sunset/sunrise access. The location is magical.

hotels.name: 敦煌青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Best for backpackers. Organize desert tours here. Book ahead. Great for solo travelers.

hotels.name: 沙漠露营基地
hotels.bookingTips: Book through tour operators. The starry night is unforgettable. Bring warm layers. Once-in-a-lifetime experience.

hotels.name: 莫高窟招待所
hotels.bookingTips: Stay near caves for early access. Simple accommodation. Good for photographers wanting sunrise.

hotels.name: 敦煌飞天大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Newer hotel with western amenities. Good for business travelers. Book direct for best rates.

hotels.name: 敦煌阳光沙洲酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Reliable mid-range choice. Good location near markets. Book weekend rates.

hotels.name: 雅丹地质公园营地
hotels.bookingTips: Stay overnight at Yadan for sunset and stars. Basic facilities. The ghost city at night is magical.

hotels.name: 敦煌锦江之星
hotels.bookingTips: Budget but consistent quality. Multiple locations. Book online for discounts.

hotels.name: 丝路驿站
hotels.bookingTips: Best for night market lovers. Themed Silk Road decor. Book center rooms for less noise.

hotels.name: 玉门关酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Stay overnight near Yumenguan for sunrise. Basic accommodation. The isolation is part of the experience.

hotels.name: 阳关人家
hotels.bookingTips: Stay with local families near ancient pass. Very authentic experience. Limited English. Bring gifts.

hotels.name: 敦煌东线酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good base for Eastern circuit (Mogao alternative route). Quieter area. Book direct.

payment.description: Works in city and some attractions

culturalTips.title: Mogao Caves Respect
culturalTips.content: The Mogao Caves are sacred Buddhist sites. Don't photograph inside caves. Don't touch murals. Speak quietly. These are 1,000-year-old treasures.

culturalTips.title: Desert Environment
culturalTips.content: Dunhuang is at the edge of the Taklamakan Desert. The environment is fragile. Stay on marked paths, don't disturb desert wildlife, and carry out all trash.

culturalTips.title: Dunhuang Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Dunhuang cuisine combines Gansu and Silk Road influences. Must-try: donkey meat yellow noodles, apricot peel drink, lamb skewers, and desert chives.

culturalTips.title: Book Mogao Early
culturalTips.content: Mogao Caves tickets sell out fast, especially in peak season (May-October). Book online weeks in advance or join morning queue very early.

culturalTips.title: Islamic Culture
culturalTips.content: Dunhuang has a significant Muslim community. Respect Islamic customs. The night market has excellent halal food options.

culturalTips.title: Desert Climate
culturalTips.content: Desert temperatures vary greatly - hot daytime, cold nights. Even summer nights need warm layers. Bring sunscreen and water. Sandstorms can occur in spring.

culturalTips.title: Silk Road History
culturalTips.content: Dunhuang was a major Silk Road oasis where Buddhism, trade, and cultures met. The Mogao Caves were created by monks, merchants, and rulers over 1,000 years.

culturalTips.title: Night Market Culture
culturalTips.content: Shazhou Night Market is the heart of Dunhuang evening life. Try local snacks, buy souvenirs, and enjoy the atmosphere. The apricot juice is a must-try.

culturalTips.title: Photography Etiquette
culturalTips.content: Photography is prohibited inside Mogao Caves but allowed outside. At sand dunes, remove shoes before climbing. Respect signs at archaeological sites.

culturalTips.title: Visiting Temples
culturalTips.content: When visiting Buddhist sites like Leiyin Temple, walk clockwise around statues, speak softly, and make offerings if invited by monks.

culturalTips.title: Starry Night
culturalTips.content: Dunhuang has minimal light pollution, especially at desert camps. The Milky Way is visible on clear nights. Bring a telescope or just lie back and enjoy.

culturalTips.title: Dunhuang Souvenirs
culturalTips.content: Look for goji berries, dried apricots, desert poplar crafts, and Buddhist art reproductions. The night market has good bargaining opportunities.

culturalTips.title: Local Language
culturalTips.content: Mandarin is universal. Some Muslim vendors speak local dialect. Basic Mandarin phrases appreciated. Hand signals help in markets.

culturalTips.title: Desert Activities
culturalTips.content: When riding camels, follow handler instructions. Don't feed the animals. For sand sliding, protect electronics from sand. Wear goggles on windy days.

culturalTips.title: Ancient Passes
culturalTips.content: Yumenguan and Yangguan passes were Silk Road fortresses. Visiting these lonely ruins with historical context creates a powerful experience of ancient travelers.

emergencyContacts.name: 巴基斯坦驻乌鲁木齐总领事馆

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water essential in desert

attractions.name: 莫高窟
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site with 492 caves filled with 1,000 years of Buddhist art, including the largest Buddha statue at 35m tall.
attractions.ticketPrice: 旺季238¥ (includes digital center + cave visit)
attractions.tips: Book tickets online weeks in advance. Only 8 caves open per visit (varies). Morning visits better. Photography prohibited inside caves.

attractions.name: 鸣沙山
attractions.description: Spectacular sand dunes that emit singing sounds when the wind blows, with camel rides, sand sliding, and desert camping.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for golden dunes. Wear sandals for sand. Camel ride is touristy but scenic. Book overnight desert camping for stars.

attractions.name: 月牙泉
attractions.description: Ancient oasis in the desert with a crescent-shaped pond, surrounded by sand dunes, magical desert scenery.
attractions.tips: Walk around the pond for photos. The ancient pagoda is photogenic. Best light in late afternoon. Climb dunes for panoramic views.

attractions.name: 玉门关
attractions.description: Ancient fortress guarding the Silk Road, built during Han Dynasty, now solitary ruins in the desert.
attractions.tips: Combine with Han Dynasty Great Wall visit. The isolation is moving. Bring sun protection. Drive is scenic through desert.

attractions.name: 汉长城遗址
attractions.description: Remnants of the Han Dynasty earthen wall that once protected the Silk Road, atmospheric ruins in desert.
attractions.tips: Combine with Yumenguan Pass. The ruins are fragile - don't climb on them. The desert scenery is stunning.

attractions.name: 雅丹国家地质公园
attractions.description: UNESCO-listed geological park with dramatic wind-carved rock formations called Yadan, resembling ancient cities.
attractions.tips: Sunset tour is magical - formations turn golden. The 'Ghost City' area is most dramatic. Wear warm layers as it's cold at sunset.

attractions.name: 沙洲夜市
attractions.description: Bustling night market in Dunhuang with local snacks, souvenirs, and vibrant atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Best evening activity in Dunhuang. Try local fruits and snacks. Bargain for souvenirs. The apricot juice is refreshing.

attractions.name: 丝绸之路博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing Dunhuang's Silk Road history, ancient artifacts, and Buddhist art from the Mogao Caves.
attractions.tips: Good introduction before Mogao Caves visit. The artifacts are impressive. Audio guides available.

attractions.name: 敦煌博物馆
attractions.description: City museum with local history exhibits, Han Dynasty artifacts, and minority culture displays.
attractions.tips: Good for understanding local history. Combine with night market visit. Free and air-conditioned.

attractions.name: 沙漠露营
attractions.description: Overnight desert camping experiences including BBQ dinner, star viewing, and sunrise over the dunes.
attractions.tips: Book through local tour operators. The Milky Way view is stunning. Bring warm layers - nights are cold. The experience is unforgettable.

attractions.name: 西千佛洞
attractions.description: Cave complex smaller than Mogao but older and less crowded, with ancient Buddhist murals along the river.
attractions.tips: Good alternative if Mogao is fully booked. The setting by the river is beautiful. Allow time for both sites.

attractions.name: 鸣沙山日落
attractions.description: Popular viewpoint on Mingsha Mountain dunes for watching sunset over the singing sands.
attractions.tips: Climb dunes 30 min before sunset. The view is unforgettable. Bring water. The descent is fun sliding down sand.

attractions.name: 敦煌影视城
attractions.description: Film set built for historical movies, offering glimpse into ancient Chinese film production.
attractions.tips: Can feel touristy but fun for photos. Costume rental available. Not a must-see if time limited.

attractions.name: 敦煌研究院
attractions.description: Research institute and exhibition hall showing high-quality replicas of Mogao cave art and ongoing restoration work.
attractions.tips: Visit after Mogao to understand what you saw. The digital recreations are stunning. Excellent for those interested in art.

attractions.name: 党河
attractions.description: Lifeline river flowing through Dunhuang, creating green corridor through the desert with poplar forests.
attractions.tips: Beautiful at sunset with desert backdrop. The poplar trees turn golden in fall. Great for morning walks.

attractions.name: 雷音寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist temple with beautiful architecture, peaceful atmosphere away from crowds.
attractions.tips: Good alternative if Mogao fully booked. The temple is beautiful and peaceful. Morning visits best.

attractions.name: 沙漠越野
attractions.description: Thrilling desert buggy rides through the sand dunes, popular adventure activity in Dunhuang.
attractions.tips: Book through hotel or tour operator. Safety briefing important. Not for those with back problems. Exciting experience.

attractions.name: 悬泉汉简
attractions.description: Archaeological site where 35,000 Han Dynasty bamboo slips were discovered, documenting Silk Road communications.
attractions.tips: For history enthusiasts. The bamboo slips are fascinating. The setting in desert is atmospheric. Combine with Western Thousand Buddhas.

attractions.name: 敦煌沙漠博物馆
attractions.description: Museum about desert ecology, Sand Road history, and Dunhuang's unique environment.
attractions.tips: Good for understanding desert environment. Free and informative. Combine with morning visit before desert trip.

attractions.name: 渥洼池
attractions.description: Desert oasis with lotus flowers and water birds, serene spot for nature photography.
attractions.tips: Less known than Crescent Spring. Great for bird watching. Morning light is best for photos. Combine with Western Thousand Buddhas.

attractions.name: 胡杨林
attractions.description: Ancient desert poplar trees, some over 1,000 years old, with beautiful autumn foliage.
attractions.tips: Best in October for golden leaves. The trees are surreal in fall. Less crowded than other sites. Great for photography.

attractions.name: 阳关遗址
attractions.description: 阳关是古代丝绸之路的重要关隘，与玉门关齐名，因王维'西出阳关无故人'诗句而闻名天下，如今遗址上保留了烽火台和部分城墙遗迹。
attractions.tips: 傍晚去最美，可以看沙漠日落。建议自驾或包车前往。

attractions.name: 敦煌博物馆
attractions.description: 敦煌博物馆收藏了大量敦煌地区出土的文物，包括汉简、丝织品、佛教造像等，是了解敦煌历史和丝绸之路文化的重要场所。
attractions.tips: 免费但需要提前预约。建议先参观博物馆再去莫高窟，可以更好地理解壁画。

attractions.name: 敦煌夜市
attractions.description: 敦煌夜市是敦煌最热闹的夜生活场所，汇集了各种西北特色美食和手工艺品，游客可以品尝到正宗的驴肉黄面、杏皮水等敦煌特色小吃。
attractions.tips: 一定要尝尝驴肉黄面和杏皮水，是敦煌特色。夜市上可以买到骆驼工艺品。

attractions.name: 鸣沙山骑骆驼
attractions.description: 在鸣沙山骑骆驼是敦煌最经典的旅游体验之一，骆驼队沿着沙漠行进，重现了古丝绸之路上的商队场景，是感受丝路文化的绝佳方式。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 建议傍晚骑骆驼，可以看沙漠日落。骆驼队有固定路线，听从工作人员指挥。

attractions.name: 鸣沙山日落
attractions.description: 鸣沙山的日落是敦煌最壮观的自然景观之一，夕阳将金色的沙丘染成橙红色，光影变幻莫测，是摄影爱好者的天堂，也是情侣们浪漫的约会地点。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 建议在日落前1-2小时到达山顶，选择好拍摄位置。带好相机和三脚架。

attractions.name: 莫高窟艺术馆
attractions.description: 莫高窟艺术馆是莫高窟的数字展示中心，通过高清球幕电影和数字化展览，让游客在参观实体洞窟前先了解莫高窟的历史和艺术价值，是莫高窟参观的重要组成部分。
attractions.address: 敦煌市莫高窟数字展示中心
attractions.tips: 必须先在数字中心观看电影，再乘坐摆渡车前往实体洞窟。建议提前预约。

attractions.name: 丝绸之路博物馆
attractions.description: 丝绸之路博物馆展示了丝绸之路的历史和文化，馆内收藏了大量丝路沿线出土的文物，包括丝绸、陶瓷、金银器等，是了解丝绸之路的重要窗口。
attractions.tips: 可以和敦煌博物馆一起参观，全面了解丝绸之路的历史。

attractions.name: 鸣沙山
attractions.description: 鸣沙山因风吹沙动会发出声响而得名，沙山东西绵延40公里，南北宽约20公里，是敦煌最著名的自然景观，与月牙泉共同构成了沙漠奇观。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 建议穿防沙鞋套，赤脚走在沙子上会很烫。可以体验滑沙等沙漠活动。

attractions.name: 敦煌壁画艺术
attractions.description: 敦煌壁画是中国古代艺术的瑰宝，莫高窟内保存了从十六国到元代的壁画约45000平方米，内容包括佛教故事、神话传说、社会生活等，是世界艺术史上的奇迹。
attractions.tips: 洞窟内不允许拍照和触摸壁画。建议请专业讲解员，可以更深入了解壁画内容。

attractions.name: 雅丹魔鬼城
attractions.description: 雅丹魔鬼城是雅丹国家地质公园的核心景区，因风蚀作用形成了各种奇特的地貌造型，夜晚风声呼啸如鬼哭狼嚎，故名魔鬼城，是敦煌最震撼的自然奇观。
attractions.address: 敦煌市雅丹国家地质公园
attractions.tips: 景区较大，需要乘坐景区大巴。傍晚去最美，可以看日落。带好防晒和水。

attractions.name: 千佛洞
attractions.description: 千佛洞是莫高窟的别称，因洞窟内有大量的佛像和壁画而得名，现存洞窟735个，壁画4.5万平方米，彩塑2415尊，是世界上现存规模最大的佛教艺术宝库。
attractions.tips: A类票可以参观8个实体洞窟+数字中心，B类票只能参观4个实体洞窟。必须提前预约。

attractions.name: 敦煌光热电站
attractions.description: 敦煌光热电站是中国首座大规模光热发电站，巨大的镜面阵列和中央高塔构成了壮观的现代工业景观，被誉为'戈壁上的太阳花'，是科技与自然结合的典范。
attractions.tips: 可以在公路上远观，非常壮观。建议下午去，阳光照射下镜面反射很美。

attractions.name: 戈壁滩
attractions.description: 敦煌周边的戈壁滩是典型的荒漠地貌，一望无际的砾石和沙漠构成了苍凉壮美的景观，是自驾游和探险旅行的绝佳目的地，也是拍摄西部片的理想场景。
attractions.tips: 建议自驾或包车前往。注意防晒和补水。晚上可以拍星空。

attractions.name: 汉代烽火台
attractions.description: 敦煌周边保留了大量汉代烽火台遗址，这些烽火台是古代军事防御体系的重要组成部分，用于传递军情，如今是研究汉代军事和丝绸之路的重要实物资料。
attractions.address: 敦煌市周边（阳关、玉门关附近）
attractions.tips: 可以和阳关、玉门关一起游览。遗址较分散，建议自驾前往。

attractions.name: 月牙泉夜景
attractions.description: 月牙泉在月光下呈现出与白天截然不同的神秘美感，泉水映着月光，四周沙山环绕，寂静而壮美，是敦煌最浪漫的夜景之一。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 景区关门较早，月牙泉夜景需要在景区外的观景台观赏。满月时最美。

attractions.name: 敦煌古城
attractions.description: 敦煌古城是仿照古代敦煌城池建造的影视基地，再现了古代敦煌的繁华景象，城内有各种古代建筑和商铺，是拍摄古装电影和电视剧的热门取景地。
attractions.tips: 可以租古装拍照，体验穿越回古代的感觉。很多电影在此取景。

attractions.name: 丝路骆驼
attractions.description: 丝绸之路上的骆驼商队是古代东西方贸易的主要运输方式，如今在敦煌可以体验骆驼骑行，重温丝绸之路的历史风情，感受古代商旅的艰辛与浪漫。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 骆驼队有固定时间和路线，建议提前到达。注意安全，听从工作人员指挥。

attractions.name: 莫高窟壁画
attractions.description: 莫高窟壁画是敦煌艺术的精华，内容涵盖佛教故事、神话传说、社会生活等方方面面，色彩绚丽，线条流畅，是中国古代绘画艺术的巅峰之作。
attractions.tips: 洞窟内光线较暗，注意脚下安全。建议请讲解员，可以了解壁画背后的故事。

attractions.name: 鸣沙山月牙泉
attractions.description: 鸣沙山月牙泉是敦煌最著名的景点，沙泉共存的奇观已有数千年历史，月牙泉形如弯月，被沙山环抱而不被掩埋，被誉为'沙漠第一泉'。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 建议早上或傍晚去，中午沙子很烫。可以骑骆驼上山，也可以步行。

attractions.name: 敦煌佛教艺术
attractions.description: 敦煌佛教艺术是中国佛教艺术的集大成者，从莫高窟到榆林窟，从壁画到彩塑，展现了中国佛教艺术从十六国到元代的发展历程，是世界文化遗产的重要组成部分。
attractions.tips: 建议安排1-2天时间，系统参观莫高窟和其他石窟。提前预约门票。

attractions.name: 戈壁探险
attractions.description: 敦煌周边的戈壁滩是户外探险的天堂，可以进行沙漠越野、徒步穿越、星空露营等活动，感受大漠孤烟直的壮美意境，是追求刺激和冒险的旅行者的理想目的地。
attractions.tips: 建议参加正规的户外探险团，注意安全。带足水和食物，做好防晒。

attractions.name: 敦煌公园
attractions.description: 敦煌公园是敦煌市区内最大的公园，园内有湖泊、亭台和各种沙漠植物，是市民休闲娱乐的好去处，也是游客了解敦煌本地生活的好地方。
attractions.tips: 傍晚去最舒适，可以和当地人一起散步。公园内有儿童游乐设施。

attractions.name: 北凉石窟
attractions.description: 北凉石窟是敦煌地区最早的佛教石窟之一，开凿于北凉时期（约公元400年），比莫高窟还要早，是研究中国早期佛教艺术的重要遗址。
attractions.tips: 游客较少，可以安静参观。建议和莫高窟对比，了解佛教艺术的发展。

attractions.name: 三危山
attractions.description: 三危山位于莫高窟对面，是敦煌的神山，据传说乐僔和尚看到三危山上的金光而开凿了莫高窟，山上有古代寺庙遗址和观景台，可以俯瞰莫高窟全景。
attractions.tips: 山上风大，注意安全。可以在山上拍摄莫高窟全景。

attractions.name: 敦煌党河风情线
attractions.description: 党河风情线是敦煌市区沿党河建设的景观带，两岸绿树成荫，河水清澈，是市民休闲散步的好去处，也是游客在敦煌市区休闲的好地方。
attractions.tips: 傍晚和晚上最美，灯光璀璨。可以沿河散步，感受敦煌的城市生活。

attractions.name: 敦煌文化遗产
attractions.description: 敦煌是丝绸之路上最重要的文化遗产地之一，拥有莫高窟、玉门关、阳关等多处世界文化遗产，是中华文明与世界文明交流互鉴的重要见证。
attractions.tips: 建议安排2-3天时间，系统参观各遗产点。提前预约莫高窟门票。

attractions.name: 鸣沙山沙漠活动
attractions.description: 鸣沙山提供各种沙漠活动，包括滑沙、沙漠摩托、沙漠越野等，是体验沙漠乐趣的最佳去处，适合各个年龄段的游客参与。
attractions.address: 敦煌市鸣沙山月牙泉景区
attractions.tips: 建议穿运动鞋，带好防晒用品。沙漠摩托很刺激但注意安全。
